en: He had sex, and we get hit in our heads. You know what?
ko: 우리한테 말하지도 않고 섹스하고 머리를 맞았어.

en: I want you to leave. Get out of here. Just get out now. No, no. No, I want to stay.
ko: 지금 나가. 아니, 아니. 알아. 난 여기 있고 싶어.

en: I want to talk about this. Okay. All right.
What? Was she good? Don't answer that.
Come on, Ross. You said you wanted to talk about it. Let's talk about it. How was she?
She was great. She was awful. Horrible. Not good.
Should we do something? Yeah. Never cheat on Rachel.
I was disgusted with myself. And this morning, I was so... I was...
